data.name: Master of the House DX
data.detailed_description:
Master of the House DX flips the script on tower defense, as you control the monsters!

Each level features three battle-filled lanes crawling with enemy invaders who’ve captured a helpless maid. Your job? Break through their ranks, destroy the bindings, and claim your reward. Deploy your units with precision, upgrade their stats—damage, health, speed, and more—and adapt your strategy to dominate each stage.

Once the dust settles, enjoy a well-earned victory scene, as each grateful maid gives thanks to her monstrous liberators.

This deluxe edition packs in:

  • All-new high-quality art

  • 12 unique levels of erotic strategy action

  • 20+ upgradable units to customize your approach

  • 24 animated erotic scenes

  • New dialogue, refined level design, and improved performance

  • With enhanced visuals, smoother gameplay, and more seductive content than ever, Master of the House DX is the ultimate way to play!

Every victory ends in pleasure!

Free her body. Win her heart.

data.short_description: Master of the House DX flips the script on tower defense, as you control the monsters!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit)
  • 處理器: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit)
  • 處理器: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
